specific_mechanism: Star-compass wayfinding: 32-point spectrum of rising/setting stars allocated as bearings; wayfinder mentally rotates spectrum at each waypoint
llm_application: LLM positional-encoding rotation spectrum: rotate position-encoding spectrum at each waypoint of long-context inference; 32-point spectral allocation guides attention bearing.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes ancient-marine-navigation spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
